# iosxr_crypto_client_authentication (Data Source)

This data source can read the Crypto Client Authentication configuration.

> **Note:** This data source is only supported from IOS-XR version 25.1 and above.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxr_crypto_client_authentication" "example" {
  # NOTE: This data source is only supported from IOS-XR version 25.1 and above
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `profile` (Attributes List) Template that will be pinned to applications (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--profile))

<a id="nestedatt--profile"></a>
### Nested Schema for `profile`

Read-Only:

- `password_six` (String, Sensitive) Specifies that an clear text key will follow
- `profile_name` (String) Template that will be pinned to applications
- `username` (String) Configure Username
